extraction.abstract: This chapter, while emphasizing the aspect of control, describes only very briefly the methods followed for achieving quality assurance. The bibliography given in the Annexure will provide the reader with more information in this field.
extraction.notes: Chapter 2 from the book "Quality Control in Road Construction", 1st Edition, CRC Press (originally First Published 2002, eBook published 2026-03-02). DOI resolves to a Taylor & Francis chapter landing page. Full text access is restricted; no PDF link available.
